plays.playDescription: D.Akers kicks onside 7 yards from PHI 30 to PHI 37. R.Williams for 37 yards, TOUCHDOWN. Recovered the ball left side of the field. The last time a kickoff was returned for 37 or fewer yards for a touchdown was Dec. 19, 1999 when Henry Jones of Buffalo recorded a 37-yard touchdown return.
